section_id: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer - Inclusion Criteria
title: Who are included under this category?
content:
1. An OFW who is on vacation or on emergency leave and will resume employment with the same employer in the same worksite.
2. A vacationing OFW who will return to the same employer but in another country/worksite.
3. A worker who has stayed in the country for an extended period and is returning to the same employer.
